ID.AM-1.title: Asset Management
ID.AM-1.objective: Physical devices and systems are inventoried
ID.AM-1.risk_if_missing: Unknown assets increase attack surface and unmanaged vulnerabilities

ID.GV-1.title: Governance
ID.GV-1.risk_if_missing: Lack of governance leads to inconsistent and unenforced security controls

ID.RA-1.title: Risk Assessment
ID.RA-1.objective: Cybersecurity risks are identified and documented
ID.RA-1.risk_if_missing: Unidentified risks may lead to unplanned security incidents

PR.AC-1.title: Identity and Access Management
PR.AC-1.risk_if_missing: Unauthorized access and insider threats due to weak identity controls

PR.DS-1.title: Data Security
PR.DS-1.risk_if_missing: Sensitive data exposure and regulatory non-compliance

PR.IP-3.title: Configuration and Patch Management
PR.IP-3.objective: Configuration change control processes are in place
PR.IP-3.risk_if_missing: Exploitation of known vulnerabilities due to delayed patching

DE.CM-1.title: Continuous Monitoring
DE.CM-1.objective: Network and systems are continuously monitored
DE.CM-1.risk_if_missing: Delayed detection of cyber attacks and breaches

DE.AE-1.title: Anomaly Detection
DE.AE-1.objective: Anomalous activity is detected and analyzed

RS.RP-1.title: Incident Response Planning
RS.RP-1.objective: Response processes are executed during incidents
RS.RP-1.risk_if_missing: Poor response increases damage and recovery time

RC.RP-1.title: Recovery Planning
RC.RP-1.objective: Recovery processes are executed after incidents
RC.RP-1.risk_if_missing: Extended downtime and permanent data loss

RC.IM-1.title: Improvements
RC.IM-1.objective: Lessons learned are incorporated into future improvements
RC.IM-1.risk_if_missing: Same incidents recur due to lack of learning
